message:
🐛 Fix: Skip agent requests entirely in demo mode (#428)

* Add backend demo mode for instant demo data

When demo mode is enabled (via X-Demo-Mode header), the backend
now returns demo data immediately without trying to connect to
real Kubernetes clusters. This eliminates 5-30 second timeout
delays that occurred when real cluster connections failed.

Changes:
- Add isDemoMode() helper to check X-Demo-Mode header
- Create demo_data.go with demo data for all endpoints
- Add demo mode checks to all MCP handlers
- Frontend sends X-Demo-Mode header when demo mode is enabled

This dramatically improves the demo experience by providing
instant responses instead of waiting for cluster timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix: Skip agent requests entirely in demo mode

Previously, agent requests to 127.0.0.1:8585 were only skipped on
Netlify (isDemoModeForced) but not when demo mode was user-enabled
locally. This caused console errors when running in demo mode without
the local agent.

Fixed by adding getDemoMode() checks in:
- fetchClusterListFromAgent() - skips /clusters request
- fetchSingleClusterHealth() - skips /cluster-health request
- detectClusterDistribution() - skips kubectl proxy commands
- getAgentClusters() - returns empty list for agent-based fetchers

Now demo mode fully skips all local agent communication, eliminating
ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED errors in the console.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
 import { useCache, type RefreshCategory } from '../lib/cache'
 import { isBackendUnavailable } from '../lib/api'
 import { kubectlProxy } from '../lib/kubectlProxy'
-import { isDemoModeForced } from './useDemoMode'
+import { isDemoModeForced, getDemoMode } from './useDemoMode'
 import { clusterCacheRef } from './mcp/shared'
 import type {
   PodInfo,
@@ -135,8 +135,8 @@ async function fetchFromAllClusters<T>(
 
 /** Get reachable cluster names from the shared cluster cache (deduplicated) */
 function getAgentClusters(): Array<{ name: string; context?: string }> {
-  // No local agent on Netlify — return empty to skip all agent requests
-  if (isDemoModeForced) return []
+  // No local agent in demo mode — return empty to skip all agent requests
+  if (isDemoModeForced || getDemoMode()) return []
   // Skip long context-path names (contain '/') — these are duplicates of short-named aliases
   // e.g. "default/api-fmaas-vllm-d-...:6443/..." duplicates "vllm-d"
   return clusterCacheRef.clusters
